plan.summary: Add XML documentation to all public members across 52 undocumented C# files in DLPhone

patterns.description: C# source file with public classes, methods, fields, and properties that lack XML documentation comments
patterns.transformation: Add /// <summary> XML doc comments to every public class, struct, enum, method, property, field, and event. Read the code to understand what each member does and write accurate, concise documentation. Do NOT change any code — only add documentation comments.
patterns.exemplar_diff: add XML doc comments to all public members
